demo.title: onair-shoutout.sh
demo.code:
# One-time: deps + a wallet holding USDC on Base (no ETH needed)
pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
export GMFARCASTER_PRIVATE_KEY=0x...

# Step 1: preview — validates + prints exactly what will air, pays NOTHING
python scripts/request.py \
  --sponsor "Acme Frames" \
  --read "Today's GM is brought to you by Acme Frames — ship a Farcaster mini app fast." \
  --url "https://acmeframes.xyz"

# Step 2: confirm — pays $5 USDC via x402, returns a RECEIPT (pending_review),
# not a confirmed read; declines are refunded
python scripts/request.py --sponsor "Acme Frames" --read "..." --url "https://acmeframes.xyz" --confirm

# Check status later (free) — pending_review -> approved -> aired
python scripts/request.py --status sho_8f3c2a1b9d4e

setup: No signup, no API key — payment via x402 is the authorization ($5 USDC per submission on Base)
Payments are pinned: the script only pays a 402 challenge matching Base USDC, GM Farcaster's wallet, and max $5 — anything else is refused before signing
Set `GMFARCASTER_PRIVATE_KEY` to a dedicated low-balance wallet holding USDC on Base (gasless for the signer — no ETH needed)

Preview with `python scripts/request.py --sponsor ... --read ...` (pays nothing), get the user's approval, then re-run with `--confirm` to pay — you get a receipt; GM Farcaster reviews every read and refunds declines
Poll `python scripts/request.py --status <request_id>` (free) — never re-submit to check progress
